message:
fix(core): declare 46 orphaned source modules in lib.rs and fix compilation

Add pub mod declarations for 46 source files that existed but weren't
compiled. Includes proper feature gates (subprocess-bridge for mission/tx/
planner/shadow/canary modules, vendored for vendored_migration_map,
web for web_framework). Adds MissionAgentAvailability enum and
MissionAgentCapabilityProfile struct to plan.rs (required by
planner_features and mission_loop). Fixes safe_channel Drop impl
Send bound mismatch and several pre-existing test compilation issues
(MuxHealthSample missing fields, RuleDef field renames, DecisionEvent
field changes).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

         anchors: vec!["ERROR".to_string(), "WARN".to_string()],
         regex: Some(r"(?i)(ERROR|WARN):\s*(.+)".to_string()),
         description: "Test rule for telemetry".to_string(),

         manual_fix: None,

     };
 
     let pack = PatternPack::new("test-pack", "1.0.0", vec![rule]);
